# netbox_owner (Resource)

From the NetBox documentation:

> An Owner represents a set of users and/or groups responsible for administering NetBox resources. Owner assignments are useful for indicating which parties are responsible for the administration of a particular object.
>
> Most objects within NetBox can be assigned an owner, although this is not required.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_owner_group" "noc" {
  name = "NOC"
}

resource "netbox_group" "noc" {
  name = "noc-engineers"
}

resource "netbox_user" "jdoe" {
  username = "jdoe"
  password = "changeme"
}

resource "netbox_owner" "noc" {
  name           = "Network Operations Center"
  group_id       = netbox_owner_group.noc.id
  user_group_ids = [netbox_group.noc.id]
  user_ids       = [netbox_user.jdoe.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String) Defaults to `""`.
- `group_id` (Number)
- `user_group_ids` (Set of Number)
- `user_ids` (Set of Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
